text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
C.B., you got a special feature... Oh! And so did
Teio! Ooh! I'm gonna keep this thing forever!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, you look up to Teio, right?
Rudolf mentioned it to me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You bet I do! The powerful confidence she runs
with comes through, even in these photos.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
When I look at them, all I can think about is how I
wanna reach her level one day!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even if I can't catch up right now, I'll keep running
for as long as it takes, until we're shoulder to
shoulder!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Then you'll probably make it into a special
feature too, before long.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Y-you think so?! ...Does that mean I might
get to be interviewed alongside Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, C.B.! What was it like being photographed
with Rudolf and so many other famous
Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Good question. Heh, I can't say I really
remember. Guess it wasn't that special to me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! I should've guessed! If it were me, I'd be
so nervous my face would lock up!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Yeah? Well, while I don't really remember how I felt... things like this are fun to think about.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The time forgotten by me remains in the hands of
others... Yeah. That's a fun thought.
